ddls:
CREATE TABLE "golfers" (
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golfer */,
  "golfer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the golfer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the golfer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the golfer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the golfer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the golfer */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap of the golfer */,
  "professional_status" TEXT /* Status indicating whether the golfer is professional or amateur */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor, if any */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the golfer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the golfer's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("golfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_date" TEXT /* Date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool of the tournament */,
  "number_of_holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes played in the tournament */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "course_par" INTEGER /* Par score of the course */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the tournament */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tournament was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tournament's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer who achieved the score */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the score was achieved */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the golfer */,
  "place" TEXT /* Finishing place of the golfer in the tournament */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the golfer in the tournament */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played by the golfer in the tournament */,
  "total_strokes" INTEGER /* Total number of strokes taken by the golfer in the tournament */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit by the golfer */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Number of greens hit in regulation */,
  "putts_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of putts taken by the golfer */,
  "bunker_escapes" INTEGER /* Number of successful bunker escapes */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties incurred by the golfer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_golfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfer_id") REFERENCES golfers ("golfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer being evaluated */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the golfer across all tournaments */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the golfer across all tournaments */,
  "top_10_finishes" INTEGER /* Number of top-10 finishes by the golfer */,
  "total_tournaments_played" INTEGER /* Total number of tournaments played by the golfer */,
  "best_finish" TEXT /* Best finishing place achieved by the golfer */,
  "worst_finish" TEXT /* Worst finishing place achieved by the golfer */,
  "fairways_hit_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of fairways hit by the golfer */,
  "greens_in_regulation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of greens hit in regulation */,
  "putting_average" REAL /* Average number of putts taken per round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_golfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfer_id") REFERENCES golfers ("golfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer being analyzed */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament being analyzed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being used */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the analytic */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., performance, financial, etc.) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_golfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfer_id") REFERENCES golfers ("golfer_id")
)
